config.script:
class RapParamCustom Private m_strXMLPart Private m_strVBPart Private m_strFopenPart Private m_strParamName Private m_strBindExpr Private m_nMode Private m_strFirstValue Private m_strWhereCustom Private m_pAfc Private m_bAllowNone private m_nParamNr private m_strExtraXMLPart private m_strExtraInitPart public ctrls_id public ctrls_obj Public Sub initialize() m_nMode = 0 m_strXMLPart = "" m_strVBPart = "" m_strBindExpr = "" m_strFopenPart = "" m_strExtraXMLPart = "" m_bAllowNone = False m_strFirstValue = "" m_strWhereCustom = "(1=1)" End Sub Public Function allow_none() m_bAllowNone = True End Function Public Property Let ParamName(ByVal vData ) m_strParamName = vData End Property Public Property Get ParamName() ParamName = m_strParamName End Property Public Property Let first_value(ByVal vData ) trans_.var(9830) = cstr(vData) End Property Public Property Get first_value() if trans_.isvar(9830) then first_value = cstr(trans_.var(9830)) else first_value = "" end if End Property Public Property Let last_value(ByVal vData) trans_.var(9831) = cstr(vData) End Property Public Property Get last_value() if trans_.isvar(9831) then first_value = cstr(trans_.var(9831)) else first_value = "" end if End Property Public Property Let ExtraXML(ByVal strData ) m_strExtraXMLPart = strData End Property Public Property Let ExtraINIT(ByVal strData ) m_strExtraInitPart = strData End Property Public Property Let mode(ByVal nMode) trans_.var(9829) = clng(nMode) End Property Public Property Get mode() if trans_.isvar(9829) then mode = clng(trans_.var(9829)) else trans_.message 0,0,"Brak zdefiniowanej zmiennej 9829" mode = clng(0) end if End Property Public Function Bind(ByVal strTableName , ByVal strFieldName ) m_strBindExpr = strTableName + "." + strFieldName Set Bind = Me End Function Public Function BindExpr(ByVal strBindExpr ) m_strBindExpr = strBindExpr Set BindExpr = Me End Function Public Function get_bindexpr() get_bindexpr = m_strBindExpr End Function Public Function get_xml_part(ByVal nParamNr , ByRef pRPDB ) Dim firstId: firstId = nParamNr * 10 m_strXMLPart = vbCrLf + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + vbCrLf + m_strExtraXMLPart + vbCrLf m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + _ "
" + vbCrLf + _ "
" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf + _ "
" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + vbCrLf + _ "" + vbCrLf get_xml_part = m_strXMLPart End Function Public Function get_vb_part(ByVal nParamNr, ByRef pRPDB ) Dim firstId: firstId = nParamNr * 10 m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ "function check" + CStr(nParamNr) + vbCrLf + _ " check" + CStr(nParamNr) + " = true" + vbCrLf + _ "end function " m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function init" + CStr(firstId) + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + m_strExtraInitPart + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ "function desc" + CStr(firstId) + "(newValue) " + vbCrLf + _ " if bError then exit function" + vbCrLf + _ " dim strDesc" + vbCrLf + _ " trans_.var(9829) = clng(newValue)" + vbCrLf + _ " dim strDokladnie: strDokladnie= page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId+4) + ").value" + vbCrLf + _ " if clng(newValue)=clng(1) then" + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc=""Pole 'Indeksy' dowolne""" + vbCrLf + _ " trans_.var(9830) = "" (1=1) """ + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=clng(2) then" + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc=""Pole 'Indeksy' wybrane""" + vbCrLf + _ " trans_.var(9830) = strDokladnie" + vbCrLf + _ " g_strIndeks = strDokladnie" + vbCrLf + _ " end if" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId+5) + ").text=strDesc" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId+5) + ").forecolor=rgb(0,0,0)" + vbCrLf + _ "end function" + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c" + CStr(firstId+3) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, byval newValue) " + vbCrLf + _ " bError = false" + vbCrLf + _ " c" + CStr(firstId+3) + "_ondataentered=true" + vbCrLf + _ " desc" + CStr(firstId) + "(page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId+3) + ").value)" + vbCrLf + _ " dim bEnableDokladnie:bEnableDokladnie=false" + vbCrLf + _ " if clng(newValue)=clng(2) then" + vbCrLf + _ " bEnableDokladnie=true" + vbCrLf + _ " end if" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId+4) + ").disable=not bEnableDokladnie" + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ "function c" + CStr(firstId+3) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) " + vbCrLf + _ " desc" + CStr(firstId) + "(oCtrl.value)" + vbCrLf + _ " c" + CStr(firstId+3) + "_ongetdata = true " + vbCrLf + _ "end function" + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ "function c" + CStr(firstId+4) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf + _ " bError = false" + vbCrLf + _ "end function" + vbCrLf + _ "function c" + CStr(firstId+4) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf + _ " desc" + CStr(firstId) + "(page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId+3) + ").value)" + vbCrLf + _ " c" + CStr(firstId+4) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf + _ "end function " + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ "'przechowuje dane wpisane dla pol przy wyborze indeksu" + vbCrLf + _ "dim g_strIndeks" + vbCrLf + _ "'co zostało wybrane : Wszystko, Wybrane" + vbCrLf + _ " dim g_iWybor" + vbCrLf get_vb_part = m_strVBPart End Function Public Function get_desc():get_desc = "" dim mode,strWhat if trans_.isvar(9829) then if trans_.isvar(9830) then mode = clng(trans_.var(9829)) strWhat = GetValueFromList(trans_.var(9830),", ",20) if mode = 2 then get_desc = "Pole 'Indeksy' wybrane: " end if get_desc = get_desc + strWhat end if end if End Function ' instrukcje inicjujące stany kontrolek - do fopen Public Function get_vb_init_ctrls_part(ByVal nParamNr, ByRef pRPDB ): get_vb_init_ctrls_part = "" Dim firstId: firstId = nParamNr * 10 m_strFopenPart = "init" + CStr(firstId) + "()" + vbCrLf get_vb_init_ctrls_part = m_strFopenPart End Function Public Function get_where_part(ByRef pTransaction) : get_where_part = "" dim iMode,strValue,strValue2 if trans_.isvar(9829) then iMode = clng(trans_.var(9829)) else trans_.message 0,0,"Brak zmiennej przekazującej nr. zaznaczonej pozycji" exit function end if if trans_.isvar(9830) then strValue = trans_.var(9830) if trans_.isvar(9831) then strValue2 = trans_.var(9831) end if else trans_.message 0,0,"Brak zmiennej przekazującej wpisaną wartość" exit function end if dim pstrKonta,pstrKontaZPus dim iter,strConnect Select Case iMode Case 1 get_where_part = "(1=1)" case 2 get_where_part = GetValueFromList(strValue,";",0) End Select m_strWhereCustom = get_where_part End Function private function GetValueFromList(byref strValue, byval strMark, byval nMaxItem): GetValueFromList = "" 'kolejne indeksy wklejane z excela (oddzielone znakiem końca linii) strValue = Replace(Replace(strValue,chr(10),";"),";;",";") dim tab: tab = Split(strValue,";") dim iter, indeks, dots: dots = "" for iter = 0 to UBound(tab) GetValueFromList = GetValueFromList + Trim(CStr(tab(iter))) + strMark if nMaxItem > 0 and iter + 1 = nMaxItem then dots = " ..." exit for end if next if Len(GetValueFromList) > Len(strMark) + 1 then GetValueFromList = Left(GetValueFromList,Len(GetValueFromList) - Len(strMark)) + dots end if end function Public Property Let strWhereCustom(ByVal nMode) End Property Public Property Get strWhereCustom() strWhereCustom = m_strWhereCustom End Property 'czy wyswietlac czy nie Public Function is_complete():is_complete = false End Function 'czy prawidlowe wartości Public Function is_valid(ByRef strMessage ) is_valid = true End Function Public Function Add2CtrlTable(byval id) if isEmpty(ctrls_id) then set ctrls_id = trans_.afc.new_navoarray() end if ctrls_id.add clng(id) end function 'transfer z kontrolek na obiekt filtru Public Function Update(ByVal nParamNr , ByVal page ) if isEmpty(ctrls_obj) then set ctrls_obj = trans_.afc.new_navoarray() end if dim iter for iter = 0 to ctrls_id.UpperIndex ctrls_obj.add page.ctrl(ctrls_id.value(iter)) next End Function end class function new_custom(byval strParamName) Set new_custom = New RapParamCustom new_custom.ParamName = strParamName end function
